src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on the target JDK/runtime.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ modules and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Use text blocks for multi-line log message formatting to improve readability.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles to ensure meaningful log output.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in an array for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Replace the Hibernate5 Jackson module with its Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or incompatible in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3/JDK 17+), causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the updated dependency stack.

Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource provider after LiquibaseProperties, likely to align with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration expectations or resolve dependency injection ordering issues.
Replace the deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to adapt to the Liquibase API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in newer Liquibase versions; calling it causes a compile error or runtime NoSuchMethodError.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it prevents compilation in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HTTP security configuration from imperative configure(HttpSecurity) method to declarative SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is part of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; Spring Security 6.0 requires defining security rules via SecurityFilterChain beans.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
@Override
public void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to use the new Spring Security 5.7+ API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration to align with modern browser standards and Spring Security API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.0; the method no longer exists, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWTConfigurer with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom JWT configuration via apply(securityConfigurerAdapter()) is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model and Spring Security 6.0's strict OAuth2 resource server integration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom exception handling via problemSupport is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model and Spring Security 6.0's standard OAuth2 error handling.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity configuration for ignoring static resources as it is no longer needed with the new SecurityFilterChain approach.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurity configuration is separate from HttpSecurity in the new model; static resources are now handled via permitAll in the SecurityFilterChain.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and ignore specific request matchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old CSRF configuration syntax is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for content security policy, frame options, and referrer policy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old header configuration syntax is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old session management syntax is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CorsFilter is no longer used in the new security configuration; SpaWebFilter is added to handle SPA routing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on TokenProvider and SecurityProblemSupport as they are no longer used in the new security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: TokenProvider and SecurityProblemSupport are no longer needed with the new OAuth2 resource server configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
private final TokenProvider tokenProvider;
private final SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add JHipsterProperties dependency to configure security settings dynamically.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: JHipsterProperties is needed to configure content security policy and other security settings dynamically.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update authorization rules to include new endpoints and use requestMatchers instead of antMatchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old authorization rules use antMatchers which is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor static resource location configuration to use a single base path instead of multiple specific paths.
Update resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader globbing instead of directory-based paths.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated URLDecoder(String, String) with URLDecoder(String, Charset) to avoid UnsupportedEncodingException.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: URLDecoder(String, String) is deprecated in Java 11 and removed in Java 17+, causing compile errors or deprecation warnings treated as errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for UnsupportedEncodingException.
Remove unused import for java.util.*.
Remove unused import for MediaType.
Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) { ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to support allowedOriginPatterns and modern Swagger UI paths.
